heading: Filter Query Insights
body:
You can filter the **Query Insights** page by node, node state
(primary or secondary), and shard. You can also filter by a custom date
range within the last seven days, or select one of the following preset
time ranges:

- 7 days

- 5 days

- 2 days

- 24 hours (default)

- 12 hours

- 8 hours

- 1 hour

When you apply a filter, Atlas re-fetches data for the charts and
table on the current screen.

> **Note:** [Analytics nodes](add-analytics-node) are included when you
> filter by secondary node state.
